description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the java:8 Docker image and defines a global before_script to chmod +x gradlew and a GRADLE_OPTS variable set to -Dorg.gradle.daemon=false. Define a single deploy stage. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that runs ./gradlew -g /cache/.gradle clean then ./gradlew -g /cache/.gradle javadoc, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch. Add a release job in the deploy stage that runs ./gradlew -g /cache/.gradle clean, ./gradlew -g /cache/.gradle sourcesJar, ./gradlew -g /cache/.gradle javadocJar, ./gradlew -g /cache/.gradle assemble, and ./gradlew -g /cache/.gradle exampleJar, stores the resulting JAR files under releases/v$VERSION/ as artifacts, sets a VERSION variable to 0.1, and is triggered manually. Both jobs share the before_script and use /cache/.gradle as a Gradle cache directory.
